description: Create a content slide on emerging countries' investments in frontier technologies using a sidebar-left layout with a headline and five-column text highlights of country examples.

header.headline: In emerging countries, ongoing investment in cutting-edge technologies are facilitating future economic growth
header.sub: Emerging countries: Selected investments in frontier technologies

items.text: Indonesia: As the fastest growing sector in Indonesia, its digital economy is predicted to reach USD 124 billion by 2025, up from USD 44 billion in 2020, almost exclusively driven by private investment
